name: Bean Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the beans.
2. Cover with water and bring to a boil.
3. Add ham, vegetables (onions, carrot, celery, potato), and seasonings (celery salt, garlic salt, pepper, salt, celery seed, parsley flakes).
4. When the mixture begins to thicken, add tomato juice.
5. Cook until thick and well done, at least 3 hours. Use low heat. Add water if necessary.
Serves 8
